BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.activities
(
    activity_id serial NOT NULL,
    class_id integer,
    subject_id integer,
    school_year_id integer,
    activity_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    title character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    max_score numeric(5, 2) NOT NULL,
    quarter integer,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    teachers_name character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT activities_pkey PRIMARY KEY (activity_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.activity_scores
(
    score_id serial NOT NULL,
    activity_id integer,
    student_id integer,
    score numeric(5, 2),
    quarter integer,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    teachers_name character varying(150) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT activity_scores_pkey PRIMARY KEY (score_id),
    CONSTRAINT activity_scores_activity_id_student_id_key UNIQUE (activity_id, student_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.class
(
    class_id serial NOT NULL,
    grade_level character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    section character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    class_description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_adviser_id integer,
    program_name character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    class_code character varying(2) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT class_pkey PRIMARY KEY (class_id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.class.class_adviser_id
    IS 'The teacher assigned as class adviser';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.class_student
(
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    date_enrolled date NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    CONSTRAINT class_student_pkey PRIMARY KEY (class_id, student_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.class_subject
(
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    subject_id integer NOT NULL,
    teacher_id integer NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT class_subject_pkey PRIMARY KEY (class_id, subject_id, teacher_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.computed_grades
(
    grade_id serial NOT NULL,
    class_id integer,
    subject_id integer,
    school_year_id integer,
    student_id integer,
    quarter integer,
    written_works_total numeric(5, 2),
    written_works_percentage numeric(5, 2),
    performance_tasks_total numeric(5, 2),
    performance_tasks_percentage numeric(5, 2),
    quarterly_assessment_total numeric(5, 2),
    quarterly_assessment_percentage numeric(5, 2),
    final_grade numeric(5, 2),
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT computed_grades_pkey PRIMARY KEY (grade_id),
    CONSTRAINT computed_grades_class_id_subject_id_student_id_quarter_scho_key UNIQUE (class_id, subject_id, student_id, quarter, school_year_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.grading_criteria
(
    criteria_id serial NOT NULL,
    subject_id integer NOT NULL,
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    written_works_percentage integer NOT NULL,
    performance_tasks_percentage integer NOT NULL,
    quarterly_assessment_percentage integer NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT grading_criteria_pkey PRIMARY KEY (criteria_id),
    CONSTRAINT grading_criteria_subject_id_school_year_id_key UNIQUE (subject_id, school_year_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.school_year
(
    school_year_id serial NOT NULL,
    school_year character varying(10) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT false,
    activation_date timestamp without time zone,
    inactivation_date timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT school_year_pkey PRIMARY KEY (school_year_id),
    CONSTRAINT school_year_school_year_key UNIQUE (school_year)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.school_year.activation_date
    IS 'The date when the school year was activated';

COMMENT ON COLUMN public.school_year.inactivation_date
    IS 'The date when the school year was inactivated';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_attendance
(
    attendance_id serial NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    month integer NOT NULL,
    day integer NOT NULL,
    status character(1) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT student_attendance_pkey PRIMARY KEY (attendance_id),
    CONSTRAINT student_attendance_unique_record UNIQUE (student_id, class_id, school_year_id, month, day)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_grade
(
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    subject_id integer NOT NULL,
    teacher_id integer,
    quarter integer NOT NULL,
    grade numeric(5, 2),
    char_grade character varying(1) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    school_year_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT student_grade_pkey PRIMARY KEY (student_id, class_id, subject_id, quarter)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_gwa
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    gwa numeric(5, 2),
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT student_gwa_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT student_gwa_student_id_class_id_school_year_id_key UNIQUE (student_id, class_id, school_year_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_quarterly_gwa
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    quarter integer NOT NULL,
    quarterly_gwa numeric(5, 2),
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT student_quarterly_gwa_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT student_quarterly_gwa_student_id_class_id_school_year_id_qu_key UNIQUE (student_id, class_id, school_year_id, quarter)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_status
(
    status_id serial NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,
    school_year_id integer NOT NULL,
    status_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    reason text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    school_name character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    effective_date date NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT student_status_pkey PRIMARY KEY (status_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.student_subject_grades
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    student_id integer NOT NULL,
    subject_id integer NOT NULL,
    class_id integer NOT NULL,

    subject_final_grade numeric(5, 2),

    remarks character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT student_subject_grades_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT student_subject_grades_student_id_subject_id_class_id_schoo_key UNIQUE (student_id, subject_id, class_id, school_year_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.subject
(
    subject_id serial NOT NULL,
    subject_name character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    grade_level character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    parent_subject_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT subject_pkey PRIMARY KEY (subject_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users
(
    user_id serial NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    user_type character varying(20) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    fname character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    mname character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    lname character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    gender character varying(1) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    teacher_status boolean DEFAULT true,
    firebase_uid character varying(128) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    lrn character varying(30) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    last_logged_in timestamp without time zone,
    CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (user_id),
    CONSTRAINT users_email_key UNIQUE (email)
);
